nest-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.9× for level 1 Pokémon, and drops steadily to 1× at level 30.

Has a catch rate of given by `(40 - level) / 10`, where `level` is the wild Pokémon’s level, to a maximum of 3.9× for level 1 Pokémon. exp-share.name: exp-share
exp-share.short_effect: Held: Half the experience from a battle is split between Pokémon holding this item.
exp-share.effect: Held :   Experience is split across two groups: Pokémon who participated in battle, and Pokémon holding this item.  Each Pokémon earns experience as though it had battled alone, divided by the number of Pokémon in its group, then divided by the number of groups. Pokémon holding this item who also participated in battle effectively earn experience twice.      Fainted Pokémon never earn experience, and empty groups are ignored; thus, if a single Pokémon is holding this item and the only Pokémon who battled faints from Explosion, the holder will gain full experience.

explorer-kit.name: explorer-kit
explorer-kit.effect: Sends the trainer to the Underground.  Only usable outside.

rule-book.name: rule-book
rule-book.short_effect: List of battle types and their rules.

poke-radar.name: poke-radar
poke-radar.short_effect: Use to track down rare or shiny Pokémon. 50 steps to recharge.
poke-radar.effect: Designates several nearby patches of grass as containing Pokémon, some of which may be special radar-only Pokémon.  Successive uses in a certain way create chains of encounters with the same species; longer chains increase the chance that a shiny Pokémon of that species will appear.

point-card.name: point-card
point-card.short_effect: Keeps count of Battle Points earned.

journal.name: journal
journal.short_effect: Records prior significant activities the player took.
journal.effect: Records some of the trainer’s activities for the day.

seal-case.name: seal-case
seal-case.short_effect: Stores Seals that can be applied to Poké Ball capsules.
seal-case.effect: Contains Seals used for decorating Pokéballs.

fashion-case.name: fashion-case
fashion-case.short_effect: Holds Pokémon Accessories for use in Contests.

seal-bag.name: seal-bag
seal-bag.short_effect: Holds ten Seals for Poké Balls.

pal-pad.name: pal-pad
pal-pad.short_effect: Use to record Friend Codes and check your own.
pal-pad.effect: Contains friend codes for up to 32 other players, as well as their sprite, gender, and basic statistics for those that have been seen on WFC.

works-key.name: works-key
works-key.effect: Opens the front door of the Valley Windworks.  Reusable.

old-charm.name: old-charm
old-charm.short_effect: Trade to Cynthia’s grandmother in Celestic Town for HM04 (Surf).
old-charm.effect: Given to Cynthia’s grandmother to get the Surf HM.

galactic-key.name: galactic-key
galactic-key.short_effect: Grants access to Galactic HQ in Veilstone City.
galactic-key.effect: Grants access to Galactic HQ in Veilstone City.

red-chain.name: red-chain
red-chain.short_effect: Used to bind Palkia and Dialga.

town-map.name: town-map
town-map.short_effect: Use to see the overworld map.
town-map.effect: Displays a map of the region including the trainer’s position, location names, visited towns, gym locations, and where the trainer has been walking recently.

vs-seeker.name: vs-seeker
vs-seeker.short_effect: Allows rebattling of on-screen trainers. 100 steps to recharge.
vs-seeker.effect: Reveals trainers who want a rematch, by showing !! over their heads.  Each use drains the battery; requires 100 steps to charge.

coin-case.name: coin-case
coin-case.short_effect: Holds coins for the Game Corner.
coin-case.effect: Contains the Coins used by the Game Corner, to a maximum of 50,000.

old-rod.name: old-rod
old-rod.short_effect: Used to catch Pokémon in bodies of water.
old-rod.effect: Used to find Pokémon on the Old Rod list for an area, which are generally Magikarp or similar.

good-rod.name: good-rod
good-rod.short_effect: Used to catch Pokémon in bodies of water.
good-rod.effect: Used to find Pokémon on the Good Rod list for an area, which are generally mediocre.

super-rod.name: super-rod
super-rod.short_effect: Used to catch Pokémon in bodies of water.
super-rod.effect: Used to find Pokémon on the Super Rod list for an area, which are generally the best available there.

bicycle.name: bicycle
bicycle.effect: Increases movement speed outside or in caves.  In high gear, allows the trainer to hop over some rocks and ascend muddy slopes.

suite-key.name: suite-key
suite-key.short_effect: Opens a locked building in the Lakeside Resort.
suite-key.effect: Opens the locked building in the lakeside resort.

oaks-letter.name: oaks-letter
oaks-letter.short_effect: Allows access to Seabreak path, Flower Paradise, and Shaymin.
oaks-letter.effect: Grants access to Flower Paradise and Shaymin.

lunar-wing.name: lunar-wing
lunar-wing.short_effect: Cures sailor’s son of nightmares in Canalave City.
lunar-wing.effect: Cures the sailor’s son of his nightmares; no reward, only a side effect of seeing Cresselia.

member-card.name: member-card
member-card.short_effect: Allows access to Newmoon Island and Darkrai.
member-card.effect: Provides access to Newmoon Island and Darkrai.

azure-flute.name: azure-flute
azure-flute.short_effect: Allows entry into the Hall of Origin. Unreleased.

ss-ticket.name: ss-ticket
ss-ticket.short_effect: Ticket for a ship. (RSE: S.S. Tidal LF: S.S. Anne HG: S.S. Aqua)
ss-ticket.effect: Allows passage on a ferry.  The same item is used for different ferries between different games.

contest-pass.name: contest-pass
contest-pass.effect: Allows the trainer to enter Contests.

magma-stone.name: magma-stone
magma-stone.effect: Causes Heatran to appear at Reversal Mountain.  Unused prior to Black and White 2.

parcel.name: parcel
parcel.short_effect: Given to the trainer’s rival in Jubilife City. Contains Town Maps.
parcel.effect: Given to the trainer’s rival in Jubilife City.  Contains two Town Maps, one of which is given to the trainer upon delivery.

coupon-1.name: coupon-1
coupon-1.short_effect: The first of three tickets used to obtain a Pokétch.
coupon-1.effect: One of three coupons needed to receive a Pokétch.

coupon-2.name: coupon-2
coupon-2.short_effect: The second of three tickets used to obtain a Pokétch.
coupon-2.effect: One of three coupons needed to receive a Pokétch.

coupon-3.name: coupon-3
coupon-3.short_effect: The last of three tickets used to obtain a Pokétch.
coupon-3.effect: One of three coupons needed to receive a Pokétch.

storage-key.short_effect: Grants access to the Team Galactic warehouse in Veilstone City.
storage-key.effect: Grants access to the Team Galactic warehouse in Veilstone City.

secret-potion.name: secret-potion
secret-potion.short_effect: Used to heal the Ampharos at the top of Olivine Lighthouse.
secret-potion.effect: Required to cure the Psyducks blocking Route 210 of their chronic headaches.

griseous-orb.name: griseous-orb
griseous-orb.short_effect: Boosts the damage from Giratina’s Dragon-type and Ghost-type moves by 20%, and transforms it into Origin Forme.
griseous-orb.effect: Held by Giratina :   Holder’s Dragon and Ghost moves have 1.2× their base power.      Holder is in Origin Forme.  This item cannot be held by any Pokémon but Giratina.  When you enter the Union Room or connect to Wi-Fi, this item returns to your bag.

vs-recorder.name: vs-recorder
vs-recorder.short_effect: Records wireless, Wi-Fi, or Battle Frontier battles, and stores points.
vs-recorder.effect: Optionally records wireless, Wi-Fi, and Battle Frontier battles.  Tracks Battle Points earned in the Battle Frontier, and stores commemorative prints.

gracidea.name: gracidea
gracidea.short_effect: Changes an unfrozen Shaymin to Sky Forme in the day.
gracidea.effect: Used by trainer on a Shaymin :   Changes the target Shaymin from Land Forme to Sky Forme.      This item cannot be used on a frozen Shaymin or at night. berry-pots.name: berry-pots

squirt-bottle.name: squirt-bottle

lure-ball.name: lure-ball
lure-ball.short_effect: 3× effectiveness while fishing. Made from Blu Apricorn.
lure-ball.effect: Used by trainer in battle :   Attempts to catch a wild Pokémon.  If used in a trainer battle, nothing happens and the ball is lost.      If the wild Pokémon was encountered by fishing, the wild Pokémon’s catch rate is 3× normal.

level-ball.name: level-ball
level-ball.short_effect: Success rate based off of fraction target Pokémon is of user’s Pokémon. Made from Red Apricorn.
level-ball.effect: Used by trainer in battle :   Attempts to catch a wild Pokémon.  If used in a trainer battle, nothing happens and the ball is lost.      If the trainer’s Pokémon’s level is higher than:      * four times the wild Pokémon’s, the wild Pokémon’s catch rate is 8× normal.     * than twice the wild Pokémon’s, the wild Pokémon’s catch rate is 4× normal.     * the wild Pokémon’s, the wild Pokémon’s catch rate is 2× normal.

moon-ball.name: moon-ball
moon-ball.short_effect: 4× effectiveness on familes of Pokémon with a Moon Stone evolution. Made from Ylw Apricorn.
moon-ball.effect: Used by trainer in battle :   Attempts to catch a wild Pokémon.  If used in a trainer battle, nothing happens and the ball is lost.      If the wild Pokémon is a Clefairy, Nidoran♂, Nidoran♀, Jigglypuff, Skitty, or any evolution thereof, the wild Pokémon has 4× its catch rate.

heavy-ball.name: heavy-ball
heavy-ball.short_effect: Has flat bonus or penalty to catch rate depending on weight class of target. Made from Blk Apricorn.
heavy-ball.effect: Used by a trainer in battle :   Attempts to catch a wild Pokémon.  If used in a trainer battle, nothing happens and the ball is lost.      If the wild Pokémon weighs:      * 409.6 kg (903.0 lb) or more, its catch rate is 40 more than normal.     * 307.2 kg (677.3 lb) or more, its catch rate is 30 more than normal.     * 204.8 kg (451.5 lb) or more, its catch rate is 20 more than normal.     * less than 204.8 kg (451.5 lb), its catch rate is 20 less than normal.

fast-ball.name: fast-ball
fast-ball.short_effect: 4× effectiveness on Pokémon with 100 or greater base speed. (Gen II: Roaming or Fleeing Pokémon). Made from Wht Apricorn.
fast-ball.effect: Used by a trainer in battle :   Attempts to catch a wild Pokémon.  If used in a trainer battle, nothing happens and the ball is lost.  :   If the wild Pokémon’s base speed is 100 or more, its catch rate is 4× normal.

friend-ball.name: friend-ball

friend-ball.effect: Used by a trainer in battle :   Attempts to catch a wild Pokémon.  If used in a trainer battle, nothing happens and the ball is lost.      If caught, the wild Pokémon’s happiness starts at 200.

love-ball.name: love-ball
